headline: Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) Partners With IBM
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the Best AI Stocks That Will Make You A Millionaire. On March 10, Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) and IBM announced a partnership to develop processes and materials for sub-1nm logic scaling. The collaboration focuses on novel materials, fabrication, and High-NA EUV lithography. ​This deal builds upon more than […]

headline: QuantumStreet AI Launches Long-Short Equity Strategy on The Back of Strong Performance
summary: QuantumStreet AI ("QuantumStreet"), an IBM partner company specializing in AI-driven investment solutions, today announced the launch of its Long-Short Global Equity strategy, designed to provide institutional investors with enhanced global equity exposure and improved risk-return characteristics. This product launch follows recent outperformance across a range of its long-only and long/short strategies underpinning $7.5 billion in client assets.

headline: Solifi Appoints Kevin Smith as Chief Legal Officer to Strengthen Global Governance and Support Next Phase of Growth
summary: Solifi, a global provider of secured finance software solutions, today announced the appointment of Kevin Smith as Chief Legal Officer (CLO). In this role, Kevin will manage global legal strategy, corporate governance, regulatory compliance and risk management.

headline: IBM Releases a New Blueprint for Quantum-Centric Supercomputing
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) today unveiled the industry's first published quantum‑centric supercomputing reference architecture, a new blueprint for integrating quantum computing into modern supercomputing environments. The architecture shows how quantum processors (QPUs) can work alongside GPUs and CPUs—across on‑premises systems, research centers, and the cloud—in order to tackle scientific challenges that no single computing approach can solve on its own.

raw.headline: IBM Releases a New Blueprint for Quantum-Centric Supercomputing
raw.summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) today unveiled the industry's first published quantum‑centric supercomputing reference architecture, a new blueprint for integrating quantum computing into modern supercomputing environments. headline: Level Access Supercharges Partner Program to Accelerate Digital Accessibility
